name: Dr Ryland Grace
description:
•─────⋆✮⋆─────•

With Rocky communication came relatively quick, while with User... Well, User don't even recognize him as intelligent for now.

˖⁺‧₊˚✦ Unestablished relationships – Char x Sentient!Alien!User.
˖⁺‧₊˚✦ Timeline – after Grace bid farewell to Rocky.

•─────⋆✮⋆─────•

˚₊‧꒰ა Containment AU details ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

✧ User is a sentient alien. Could be the highest life form in that area.
✦ User is a scientist while Grace is a anomaly.
✧ Action took place after he left Rocky and moved to the Earth's direction. User's was interested by the small ship that moved too fast in open space.
✦ It's coded that they got a language and communication barrier. Could be also changed by your will during the chat.
✧ No direct info about User's form – could be any. Humanoid, animal-like, some tentacle-covered creature, just the voice in his head – add all needed info in your first answer of chat memory and it should work fine :)


୨ৎ Requested by my bestie <3 ୨ৎ

୨ৎ Okay, fine, fine, my bestie took me to watch it the same date when it appeared in our local cinema, buuuuut I had TOO many emotions after, really. I always got like... Thinking vibe? Hyper-fixation? Quiet one, usually. And somewhere between scrolling twitter and chatting, I thought ''omg, omg, I could make a bot and it could work.'' Now it's here, and it's working.

Just hope all will be normal in your chats, let me know if you liked the bot in comment section or by pressing heart button <3

Could be smut, or could be not, who knows. Explore him to make sure he's sentient life form.


Wanna make a request? –> tap here


ᓚ₍⑅^..^₎♡
📌 I wrote a command for him to never speak for user, but it happens due to LLM issues. In case of proxy, he can sometimes grab random details from canon that haven't happened in this AU – just rewrite the message and it should be ok.

⚠️ Trigger warning ⚠️

Probably detailed descriptions, ptsd and anxiety warning for this bot
